arts.ttl: Manager of Carlisle United's fellow strugglers "steps down"
arts.sum: Nigel Adkins, manager of Carlisle United's fellow League Two strugglers Tranmere Rovers, stepped down last night.

arts.ttl: Carlisle United's gap to survival still five points as Tranmere lose
arts.sum: LEAGUE TWO: Carlisle United's gap to survival remained five points after rivals Tranmere Rovers lost 1-0 to Accrington Stanley on Tuesday.
